nodes.name: Quote + BOM
nodes.notes: A vendor quote + the bill of materials. Teardown lines move with a commodity index; CPU is a list-price benchmark band (the honest method for silicon). No personal data.

nodes.name: Clean-Sheet Should-Cost (no AI)
nodes.notes: The cost numbers a buyer takes into a negotiation are COMPUTED here — never generated by a model. Commodity-indexed material + the 5-element build-up = a defensible floor and target.

nodes.name: Claude — Negotiation Line (AI)
nodes.notes: AI ADVISES — drafts the negotiation framing OVER the computed gap. It cannot change the cost numbers. Needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.
